description: Foundation + strategy layer of the creative-strategy framework. Runs brand-intake, product-catalog, review-audit, brand-relevant-keywords, competitor-analysis, and creative-strategy-engine to produce a durable per-workspace brand bundle that creative-deep-dive and weekly-performance-deck read as upstream context. Refreshes Monday mornings.

installs.purpose: Orchestrator skill — runs the six skills in order, writes the durable bundle, schedules Monday refresh, installs user.md snippet
Setup skill — asks for brand site URL, review sources, competitors, ping channels, refresh schedule
Standalone callable — brand identity, value prop, audience, positioning
Standalone callable — products, benefits, claims, price points
Standalone callable — VOC across pain/desire/objection/comparison/use-case buckets
Standalone callable — search landscape and audience language
Standalone callable — competitor read with active-ad signal from motion inspo-creatives
Standalone callable — pain × persona × messaging-angle matrix across 5 awareness stages
Local routing index for saved brand bundles
Global INDEX.md routing entry for the brand-audit library

runtime_installs.trigger: After the first successful brand-audit for any workspace, idempotent across subsequent runs
runtime_installs.purpose: Standing instruction so all creative work reads the workspace's brand bundle as upstream context — narrowly, not as a full re-read

post_install.name: Personalize for this workspace
post_install.description: Walk the user through brand site URL, review sources, competitor list, and refresh channels

post_install.name: Introduce the new capability
post_install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Synced foundation skill bodies from the upstream source of truth (Motion-Creative/alyshas-skills). Removed environment-specific tool names (web_search, web_fetch, present_files) from brand-intake, product-catalog, brand-relevant-keywords, and competitor-analysis so each skill runs standalone in any org, not only when driven by the orchestrator. No behavior or output-format change.
Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial release. Six skills lifted from Alysha's creative-strategy framework (Foundation + Strategy layers). Each skill installs standalone at /agent/.agents/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md so it is independently auto-discoverable. Orchestrator runs them in order and writes a durable bundle under /agent/brain/brand-audit/<workspace-slug>/. Monday morning refresh routine baked in. user.md runtime install (runneth-apps:brand-audit:read-before-creative v1) so all creative work reads the bundle narrowly without re-running brand-audit.
